## ➕ Extension Details

**Extension Name:**
**Extension ID:** (from marketplace URL — e.g. `esbenp.prettier-vscode`)
**Marketplace Link:** https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=

## 📁 Category

- [ ] 🚀 Essential (All Devs)
- [ ] 🎨 Themes & Appearance
- [ ] 🐾 Fun & Personality
- [ ] 🧠 AI & Productivity
- [ ] 🌐 Web Development
- [ ] 🐍 Python & Data
- [ ] 🔧 Dev Tools & Utilities
- [ ] 🆕 New category: ___________

## 📝 Suggested description (1 sentence)

<!-- What does it do? Why is it useful? -->

## 🌟 Why include it?

<!-- Popularity, downloads, personal experience? -->

## 🔨 How to contribute

1. Fork the repo
2. Open the matching file in `data/categories/` (e.g. `data/categories/fun.json`)
3. Add your extension object to the `extensions` array
4. Run `npm test` to make sure validation passes
5. Open a PR using the PR template

## Will you open a PR?

- [ ] Yes!
- [ ] No, just suggesting
